title: Conflict Diagnosis and Semantic Resolution
description: Resolve an integration conflict by reconstructing both intents and verifying behavior rather than deleting markers until Git accepts the file. Learners cumulatively produce a conflict reproduction, resolution, and regression record through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Inspect unmerged index stages, ours/theirs/base terminology, paths, and operation context before editing.
Read conflict markers and diff views while obtaining surrounding base and commit intent.
Construct a new result from requirements, tests, and both histories rather than treating resolution as text selection.
